message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[1, 1], [2, 1], [3, 1], [4, 1]]","1"],"focus":"alternating parity with equal initial severities to exercise tie-breaks and aging flips"},{"input_lines":["[[10, 0], [11, 5], [12, 5]]","6"],"focus":"large aging_interval causing severities to go negative and reorder"},{"input_lines":["[[1000001, 3], [2, 4], [3, 3], [4, 4], [5, 3]]","2"],"focus":"mix of very large odd ID, tie-breakers, and cascading aging effects"}]}
